name: Festival Greeting
description: Warm festive wishes for occasions, holidays and national days
briefInstructions: Commission warm community celebration artwork. NO product UI, NO dashboards, NO software screens. The scene is the residential society environment — courtyard, garden, or lobby decorated for the festival. People are celebrating together naturally: families, neighbours, children. Camera captures candid joy. The brand is a quiet presence — not the hero. Bottom 30% must graduate to smooth dark for text overlay. Top-left must be clean and dark for logo.

inputs.label: Greeting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. May this festival bring joy, prosperity and togetherness
suggestions: May this festival bring joy, prosperity and togetherness to your home
Wishing you and your family a blessed and joyful celebration
May the light of this occasion guide your path to success
Celebrating the spirit of togetherness and community
